Blueprint.title: Your Cosmic Blueprint
Blueprint.subtitle:
The universe has spoken.
Here is your destiny matrix.
Blueprint.master_msg: Your energy is deeply rooted in the Wood element, signifying immense growth and resilience. However, you must be careful of sudden Fire elements that may burn your patience. This year is a turning point for your career.

Dashboard.subtitle: Your cosmic journey continues. Here is an overview of your energy.
Dashboard.empty_desc: Generate your first Blueprint to unlock the secrets of your destiny.
Dashboard.existing_result_desc: Your cosmic reading is ready. View your personalized blueprint.

Result.title: Your Cosmic Blueprint
Result.description: The stars have aligned to reveal your destiny. Read your personalized reading below.
Result.locked_desc: Unlock to reveal exact timings and actionable remedies.
Result.mock_energy: Your essence is woven from the resilient threads of ancient Wood and the transformative spark of Fire. You are entering a cosmic cycle of immense creative rebirth. Old karmic weights are burning away, revealing a path illuminated by your inner truth.
Result.mock_wealth: A sudden shift in your Earth element signifies hidden financial opportunities awakening this season. Do not seek wealth through traditional labor, but through the realization of your uniquely passionate ideas. Investments made during the waxing moon will multiply.
Result.mock_love: Your romantic aura is currently charged with intense magnetic pull. You are drawing in souls who resonate with the Metal element—sharp, focused, and grounding. Avoid those dominated by chaotic Water, as they may extinguish your rising fire.

Chat.title: Mystical Sanctuary Chat
Chat.welcome_msg: Greetings, seeker. I am {masterName}. What secrets of the Saju do you wish to unlock today?
Chat.premium_upsell: ✨ Master sees a critical turning point. Unlock Premium to reveal the truth.

Legal.terms_s1_body: By accessing and using K-Destiny ("the Service"), operated by K-Destiny Inc. ("we," "us," or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the Service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any modified terms.
Legal.terms_s2_body: K-Destiny is a digital SaaS platform that provides AI-generated Eastern astrology (Saju) readings, cosmic energy analyses, and personalized destiny reports. The Service uses artificial intelligence and traditional Eastern astrology frameworks to generate content based on user-provided birth data.
Legal.terms_s3_body: All readings, analyses, predictions, and reports provided by K-Destiny are for entertainment and informational purposes only. They should not be considered as professional advice — including but not limited to medical, financial, legal, or psychological advice. You acknowledge that the Service's content is generated by AI based on traditional astrology frameworks and should not be used as a substitute for professional consultation. K-Destiny makes no guarantees regarding the accuracy or applicability of any reading or prediction.
Legal.terms_s4_title: 4. Digital Goods and No Refund Policy
Legal.terms_s4_body: K-Destiny offers digital products and services, including but not limited to Premium Destiny Blueprints, Premium Chat consultations, and subscription access. Due to the nature of digital goods, services are provided immediately upon payment, and therefore refunds are not possible after payment.
Legal.terms_s4_li1: By completing a purchase, you acknowledge you are buying access to digital content that is delivered immediately and you agree that refunds are not available.
Legal.terms_s4_li2: By completing a purchase, you acknowledge that you are buying access to instantly delivered digital content and waive any right to a cooling-off period or refund.
Legal.terms_s4_li3: In cases of technical failure where content was paid for but not delivered, we will either redeliver the content or issue a full refund at our discretion.
Legal.terms_s4_li4: Chargebacks or payment disputes filed in bad faith may result in permanent account suspension.
Legal.terms_s5_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree not to share your account, use the Service unlawfully, reverse-engineer it, use bots, or resell content without our written permission.
Legal.terms_s6_body: All content, designs, logos, AI-generated texts, and software on the Service are protected by international intellectual property laws. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license for personal, non-commercial use only.
Legal.terms_s7_body: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, K-DESTINY INC. SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU HAVE PAID IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND.
Legal.terms_s8_body: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts located in Seoul, Republic of Korea.
Legal.terms_s9_body: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:
Legal.privacy_s1_body: K-Destiny Inc. is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the K-Destiny platform.
Legal.privacy_s2_li1: Birth Data: Name, DOB, time, place of birth — for Saju readings.
Legal.privacy_s2_li2: Account Data: Email and authentication credentials.
Legal.privacy_s2_li3: Payment Data: Processed via Stripe (PCI-DSS compliant).
Legal.privacy_s2_li4: IP address, browser type, device info, pages visited.
Legal.privacy_s2_li5: Approximate geolocation for birth country auto-detection.
Legal.privacy_s3_li1: Birth data is sent to AI models for Saju reading generation only.
Legal.privacy_s3_li3: Transactional emails and optional promotional updates (with consent).
Legal.privacy_s4_body: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only with service providers necessary to operate the platform.
Legal.privacy_s5_body: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary. AI-generated readings are cached temporarily (up to 24 hours). You may request deletion at any time.
Legal.privacy_s6_body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have various data protection rights.
Legal.privacy_s6_r1_desc: Request a copy of data we hold.
Legal.privacy_s6_r3_desc: Delete your data (right to be forgotten).
Legal.privacy_s7_body: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS/TLS encryption, OAuth 2.0, and rate limiting.
Legal.privacy_s8_body: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 16.
Legal.privacy_s9_body: Your data may be processed in countries outside your residence, with appropriate safeguards in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
Legal.privacy_s10_body: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at:
Legal.terms_s10_body: Even if your premium subscription expires, your basic account information (such as your Saju profile) will be retained for 1 year. After 1 year, all personal information will be completely deleted. During this 1-year period, you may log in to view your basic information; however, access to premium features will be restricted to the free tier level.
Legal.privacy_s11_body: Upon expiration of your premium subscription, we will retain your user information (e.g., Saju profile and birth data) for 1 year to allow you to easily resume services. During this time, you may access your basic information, but premium features will remain restricted. You may request account deletion at any time.

Pricing.title: Choose Your Destiny Plan
Pricing.subtitle: Unlock the full power of your cosmic blueprint. Every plan includes AI-powered Saju analysis and personalized guidance.
Pricing.guarantee_text: All plans are backed by our cosmic satisfaction guarantee. Entertainment purposes only.
Pricing.consent_desc: Due to the nature of our service, content is delivered immediately upon payment, and therefore refunds are not available after purchase. Do you agree to these terms?

Sync.title: Dynamic Energy Sync
Sync.subtitle: Discover the cosmic friction and harmony between two souls.
Sync.validation_msg: Please fill out both destinies completely.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your cosmic identity and preferences.
Profile.reset_saju_desc: Changing your Saju information will reset all your previously accumulated destiny data and analysis results. Do you wish to proceed?

Guide.title: How to Use K-Destiny
Guide.subtitle: Your step-by-step guide to unlocking cosmic insights.
Guide.step1_desc: Select from 10 AI Destiny Masters, each with unique cosmic specialties. Your master stays fixed until you decide to change.
Guide.step2_desc: Provide your name, date of birth, time of birth, and birthplace. This data is saved so you never have to re-enter it.
Guide.step3_desc: Receive your AI-generated Saju analysis including Core Essence, Karma Teaser, and Lucky Elements. Your result is saved for future reference.
Guide.step4_desc: Ask your selected master any Saju-related questions. Free users get 5 Karma Energy per day.
Guide.step5_desc: Discover cosmic compatibility between two people. Enter both birth details to see your harmony score.
Guide.step6_desc: Update your Saju information or switch your Destiny Master anytime from the Profile page.
Guide.tip_desc: Upgrade to Premium to unlock full blueprint details, more daily Karma Energy, and exclusive forecasts.

Modal.expiry_desc: Your premium access will expire in {days} days. Renew now to maintain your cosmic connection.
